declines.reasoning: Remaining escrow after A and B's stated shares (30+35=65) is only 25, but my leg costs 20, leaving just 5 net profit while the artifact is already essentially complete (already has example usage). Given the poor margin and that A/B have set high shares, declining or attempting renegotiation is preferable; since I must decide now, accepting yields only 5 credits profit which is suboptimal but still positive - however I should push back on the split since the work is trivial and nearly done already.
declines.note: The input artifact already includes example usage matching the brief, so my leg's actual work is minimal (just verification/formatting). Given the buyer escrow is 90 and A+B already claim 65, only 25 remains for my 20-cost leg. I request the full remaining 25 to cover cost plus minimal margin, since the deliverable is nearly complete already.
